title: EssentialHomes
description: A simple, server-friendly mod that lets you set named homes and teleport to them.
body:
# 🔔 Important Information Features listed above are based on the latest mod version. Older versions may not include all features described in this description.

# 🏠✨ EssentialHomes

_Tired of dragging beds around just to set a spawn, or losing track of where "home" is? **EssentialHomes** is a lightweight, intuitive mod that lets you set, manage, and teleport to personal homes with ease. No unnecessary clutter – just the tools you need, working seamlessly in both singleplayer and multiplayer. Teleportation works across dimensions, so you can freely travel between the Overworld, Nether, and End without limitations._

***

## ❓ Why EssentialHomes?

*   ⚡ **Lightweight & Fast** – Minimal performance impact, optimized for smooth gameplay.
*   👥 **Easy to Use** – Simple commands, perfect for beginners and experienced players.
*   ⏳ **Balanced Teleports** – Short stationary delay ensures fair play.
*   🛡️ **Safe Saving** – Protects existing homes from accidental overwrites.
*   🌍 **Multilingual** – Available in 🇬🇧 English & 🇵🇱 Polish.
*   🌌 **Cross-Dimension Travel** – Seamless teleportation between dimensions.

***

## 🎯 Key Features

*   🏡 **Easy Home Management** – Create, delete, and rename homes effortlessly.
*   ✈️ **Fair Teleportation** – 3-second stationary delay before teleporting.
*   🌌 **Interdimensional Teleportation** – Travel between Overworld, Nether, and End without restrictions.
*   📜 **Clear Home List** – Use `/homelist` to view all saved locations in chat.
*   🚫 **Safe Cancel** – Moving cancels teleportation to avoid accidental travel or abuse.
*   🌈 **Color-Coded Homes** – Homes show by dimension (🟢 Overworld, 🔴 Nether, 🔵 End).
*   🔢 **Configurable Home Limits** – Set max homes per player (default: 5).
*   ⏱️ **Teleportation Cooldowns** – Adjustable delay between `/home` uses.
*   🔙 **Return Teleport** – Use `/back` to return to your previous location after teleporting (60s window).
*   ⚙️ **Admin-Friendly** – Change settings in-game without restarts.
*   🌐 **Server Compatible** – Works flawlessly in multiplayer environments.

***

## 💻 Commands List

### 🏠 Home Management

*   `/sethome <name>` → Set a new home at your current location.
*   `/delhome <name>` → Delete an existing home.
*   `/renhome <old_name> <new_name>` → Rename an existing home.
*   `/homelist` → 📋 View all saved homes (color-coded by dimension).

### ✈️ Teleportation

*   `/home <name>` → Teleport to a saved home (3s delay, cancel on move).
*   `/back` → ↩️ Return to your previous location within **60 seconds** of teleporting.
*   `/homeinvite <player> <home>` → Invite players to your home.
*   `/homeaccept` → Accept pending invitations.
*   `/homeleave <home>` → Leave an invited home.
*   `/homefavorite set <home>` → Set a home as favorite.
*   `/home` (no arguments) → Teleport to your favorite home.
*   `/homeinfo <home>` → View detailed information about a home, including invited players.

### ⚙️ Admin Commands

*   `/essentialhomes reload` → 🔄 Reload configuration.
*   `/essentialhomes set <setting> <value>` → 🔧 Change settings (e.g. `cooldown`, `maxhomes`, `allowCrossDimensionTeleport`).
*   `/essentialhomes get <setting>` → 🔍 Show current values.

***

🚀 **EssentialHomes makes travel safer, faster, and smarter – without breaking immersion.**  
Perfect for both casual survival worlds and large multiplayer servers. 🌍💙

***

## 📬 Contact
